facts.subject: mars
facts.content: mars server went down due to memory exhaustion running local-llm at 27B parameters.

facts.subject: mars
facts.content: Concurrent model loads on mars must be capped at 2 to prevent memory exhaustion.

facts.subject: inference
facts.content: node-1 should take over inference tasks when mars is overloaded.

facts.subject: node-2
facts.content: node-2 depends on node-1 for routing.
